name: portfolio-niche-photographer
description: Portfolio user at the new WEB_COLLECT_PORTFOLIO_NICHE step says they shoot weddings/portraits. The bot must LLM-classify the niche as 'photographer', persist websiteData.portfolioNiche, and advance out of the niche state (to the about step). The niche drives the photographer sub-template + niche-appropriate hero/project auto-images. Replaces the old comma-separated services step for portfolio.
